def positive_api_endpoint_returns_json_without_documented_response_schema():
    rule_id = "api_endpoint_returns_json_without_documented_response_schema"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "API endpoint returns JSON without a Pydantic response_model or documented response schema."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
